name: Monster Girl Quest RPG
description:
I'M BACK AGAIN! You can consider a 'test' bot. So to speak. I custom made an entire lorebook for it. No, I'm not fucking around. There is over 100,000 tokens of information regarding named characters, locations, dungeons, magic, jobs, and more. All custom made. I want to die.
Incase it wasn't obvious? Themes of non-con, death, dead dove, etc.

ANYWAYS! This bot? Is meant to be a multi-opportunity one. If you know what this game is? GREAT! You'll have a wonderful time. It's got most of the named characters from the series, locations, all the possible monster girls and people. (Yes even Tamamo, don't worry.) There's the Four Heavenly Knights, the Monster Lord forces, Kings, Queens, Angels, the damn mecha pope. I got it all.

BUT! And I mean a BIG BUT. The 'timeline', chaos, all that multidimensional stuff is VERY toned down. It's still there. Tartarus rifts and all that. But through my testing Deepseek would go WAYYYYY too crazy with it. Inventing new 'Gods Of Creation'...and other nonsense. So characters like the 'White Rabbit' are still here. Just...not multi-versal dimensional hopping meta making people. Unless you make them into one. And 'Alipheese' is the endgame 'villain' here. You could follow the normal plotline, start dimension hopping, but I hope you've got a GOOOOOODDD LLM for that one.

However if you DON'T know what this series is? Still great! This is an RPG bot for people that can self insert themselves however they want. Isekai'd? Someone that's lived here forever? Someone from a foreign continent that's clueless and wants to make a life for themself? All works. I might mess with the 'multi opening messages feature' later...when I can feel my fingers again.

Basically? I made it so there's nearly infinite choices. If you want to go lewd and make a damn harem of every girl (and boy) in the world? Send it! You've got a Pocket Castle to collect them all like fucking Pokemon. Your story can be like this:

Or this:


Anyways, like I said. This can appeal to any sort of audience. Hoping I get a lot of people messing with it to see what sticks. Have fun being lewd or wholesome!


Lore for people unfamiliar with MGQ, or like...actually want to make a story:
creator: LightroHero
